hero.label: AMENITIES
hero.headline: Designed for the way you live.
hero.subtitle: From sunrise laps to evening gatherings — spaces that shape your rhythm.

image.alt: Rooftop infinity pool with panoramic Nairobi skyline at dusk

philosophy.headline: Luxury isn't measured by finishes alone.
paragraphs: It's measured by how every moment feels.
At Citrine Heights, amenities are not a checklist — they are chapters in a daily story. Wake with purpose. Work with focus. Relax without effort. Connect with intention. Belong without question.

image.alt: Sky lounge with refined interior and city views

featured.label: SIGNATURE AMENITY
featured.title: Infinity Sky Pool
featured.narrative: Suspended above the Westlands canopy, the infinity pool dissolves into the horizon. Morning laps beneath open sky. Afternoon lounging with a book. Evening cocktails as the city ignites below. This is not a amenity — it is a daily ritual.

image.alt: Infinity sky pool terrace with city panorama

items.title: Sky Lounge
items.narrative: An elevated salon for conversation and contemplation. Floor-to-ceiling glass frames the city while interiors whisper quiet luxury — the place residents gather for sunset aperitifs and unhurried evenings.

image.alt: Premium sky lounge with panoramic views

items.title: Business Lounge
items.narrative: A private workspace above the noise. High-speed connectivity, meeting pods and concierge support — so your professional life moves as seamlessly as your personal one.

items.title: Landscaped Gardens
items.narrative: Curated green corridors weave through the podium — shaded paths, native planting and quiet benches where the pace of the city fades into stillness.

image.alt: Landscaped garden paths at Citrine Heights

items.title: Residents' Terrace
items.narrative: An open-air extension of home. Morning coffee on the terrace. Weekend brunches with neighbours. A space designed for the unscripted moments that make a building feel like a community.

wellness.label: WELLNESS
wellness.headline: Restore. Recharge. Renew.
wellness.description: A sanctuary for body and mind — where fitness, recovery and stillness coexist under one roof.

items.title: Fitness Centre
items.description: State-of-the-art equipment with panoramic views. Train with intention as the city stretches beneath you.

image.alt: Premium fitness centre with city views

items.title: Yoga Studio
items.description: A calm, light-filled space for practice and meditation. Morning flow as dawn breaks over Nairobi.

items.title: Spa & Treatment Rooms
items.description: Private treatment suites for massage, therapy and recovery. Wellness, on your schedule.

image.alt: Spa treatment room with marble finishes

items.title: Sauna & Steam
items.description: Heat therapy and steam rooms for deep relaxation after a long day — or a vigorous workout.

items.title: Running Deck
items.description: An elevated track for morning runs and evening walks. Exercise with altitude and outlook.

image.alt: Outdoor running deck with skyline views

spaces.title: Residents' Lounge
spaces.narrative: A refined salon for quiet conversation and unhurried afternoons. Plush seating, curated art and a sense of arrival that feels distinctly yours.

spaces.title: Coffee Terrace
spaces.narrative: Morning rituals begin here — artisan coffee, fresh pastries and the first light of day spilling across the terrace.

spaces.title: BBQ & Dining Deck
spaces.narrative: Weekend gatherings under open sky. A dedicated grill station and al fresco dining for the celebrations that matter.

spaces.title: Private Dining Room
spaces.narrative: Host with elegance. A fully equipped private dining space for intimate dinners, milestone celebrations and memorable evenings.

image.alt: Private dining room with city views

familyLiving.label: FAMILY LIVING
familyLiving.headline: Room for every generation.
familyLiving.description: Spaces designed for the full arc of life — from first steps to quiet evening strolls.

features.title: Kids' Play Area
features.description: A safe, imaginative play zone where children explore, create and make friends within the comfort of home.

features.title: Landscaped Gardens
features.description: Shaded paths and native planting create a green retreat steps from your front door.

features.title: Walking Paths
features.description: Paved walkways weave through the podium — for morning strolls, evening walks and everything between.

features.title: Pet-Friendly Living
features.description: Dedicated pet zones and thoughtful design ensure every member of the family — including four-legged ones — feels welcome.

image.alt: Citrine Heights podium with landscaped gardens

security.label: SECURITY
security.headline: Peace of mind, always.
security.description: Discreet, comprehensive protection — so you live freely, without compromise.

features.title: 24/7 Security
features.description: Trained personnel on duty around the clock, ensuring a secure environment at every hour.

features.title: Smart Access
features.description: Keyless entry, biometric options and resident-only access to all amenity floors.

features.title: CCTV Surveillance
features.description: Comprehensive camera coverage across common areas, entrances and parking levels.

features.title: Concierge Reception
features.description: A welcoming front desk for guests, deliveries and resident assistance — always attentive, never intrusive.

features.title: Visitor Management
features.description: Digital pre-registration and controlled access for a seamless, secure guest experience.

convenience.label: CONVENIENCE
convenience.headline: Everyday ease, elevated.
convenience.description: The details that make daily life effortless — considered, integrated and always available.

features.title: EV Charging
features.description: Dedicated electric vehicle charging stations in secure parking bays.

features.title: Ample Parking
features.description: Reserved resident bays with visitor parking and motorcycle facilities.

features.title: Concierge Services
features.description: Parcel handling, reservations and lifestyle assistance at your request.

features.title: Retail & Services
features.description: Ground-floor retail and essential services within walking distance of home.

features.title: High-Speed Lifts
features.description: Multiple elevator banks with smart dispatch for minimal wait times.

features.title: Backup Power
features.description: Generator backup for common areas and essential residence systems.

timeOfDay.label: AMENITIES BY TIME OF DAY
timeOfDay.headline: A day unfolds at Citrine Heights.

moments.label: Morning
moments.narrative: A sunrise workout in the fitness centre. Coffee on the terrace as the city wakes. The day begins with intention.

moments.label: Afternoon
moments.narrative: A focused session in the business lounge. A leisurely swim in the infinity pool. Productivity and pause in equal measure.

moments.label: Evening
moments.narrative: Rooftop dining as the sky turns gold. Neighbours gather on the BBQ deck. The city glows beneath you.

moments.label: Night
moments.narrative: The sky lounge comes alive. Gardens illuminated with soft light. Night belongs to those who know how to savour it.

image.alt: Sky lounge at night with city lights
Citrine Heights tower at golden hour against the Nairobi skyline

signatureBanner.overlay: Because Home Should Feel Like A Private Resort
